response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and systems engineering experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies. While his direct GenAI production experience is limited, his technical leadership, open-source contributions, and work with Model Context Protocol (MCP) align well with the role's focus on agentic workflows and cloud integration. His career gap and lack of explicit RAG/vector DB experience are concerns but may be mitigated by his adaptability and problem-solving skills.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentorship across diverse engineering domains (e.g., staff roles, workshops, open-source projects).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) and cloud-native development (AWS, Kubernetes).
Strong full-stack expertise in TypeScript/Python and systems design, with a focus on testability and user experience.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with production-grade GenAI systems (e.g., RAG, vector databases) or LLM optimization metrics.
Career gap (2025–present) may require assessment of current technical relevance and engagement.
No advanced degree (Master’s/PhD) in AI/CS, though this is a preferred qualification.
